title: Oceanfront Penthouse
desc: An exceptional penthouse perched above the Atlantic, offering panoramic ocean views and bespoke interiors crafted by award-winning designers. Features a private rooftop terrace, chef's kitchen, and smart home integration.

title: Executive Mansion
desc: A stately 7-bedroom mansion in the city's most coveted enclave, complete with private cinema, gym, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Perfect for a distinguished family residence.

title: Heritage Villa
desc: Classic colonial architecture blended with modern comfort across a generous corner plot in the historic GRA. Timeless design, generous living spaces, and lush tropical gardens.

title: Garden Terrace Apartment
desc: A chic 3-bedroom apartment with private terrace and access to resort-style amenities in one of Lekki's finest developments. Ideal for modern urban living.

title: Lakeside Estate
desc: Commanding lakefront views from every room, this 6-bedroom estate offers unmatched privacy and a private jetty. A sanctuary of calm and luxury.

title: Sky Residence
desc: The pinnacle of urban luxury, this triplex penthouse on the most exclusive island features a rooftop infinity pool and private lift access from the basement garage.

title: Colonial Court
desc: A gracefully restored colonial estate on a leafy boulevard, offering generous living spaces and a tropical garden. The ideal family home in a quiet, prestigious neighbourhood.

title: Marina Heights
desc: A luxury smart apartment in the iconic Eko Atlantic City, with breathtaking marina views and full concierge services. The ultimate modern living experience.

title: Presidential Lodge
desc: An imposing diplomatic-grade residence in the capital's premier district with a 3-car garage, staff quarters, and a private swimming pool set in manicured grounds.
